---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work. Include examples if possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, or references that help explain the request.
